product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor Coupling Offset
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor Coupling Offset is designed to meet and surpass the strict demands of the drainage industry, offering a solution for various adaptation needs. It features a uniquely designed elastomeric sleeve with different diameters at each end for a secure and reliable seal. Equipped with two stainless steel clamping bands, it provides an effective method of connecting pipes with varying outside diameters, eliminating the need for additional bushings.These adaptor couplings are compatible with both traditional and modern pipe systems, including structural walled plastic pipes. The clamping band securely fastens to two or more external ribs on the plastic ribbed pipe, ensuring a reliable seal regardless of the coupling's position or movement.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor Coupling OffsetDurable, high-performance coupling which provides a reliable sealManufactured from EPDM Stainless steel shear band for resistance to heavy loads and shear forces 50-year manufacturer's guarantee Complies with WIS 4-41-01 Shear band ensures joint flexibility and pipe alignmentNo need for grouting in most applicationsAvailable in multiple sizes
product.variant_name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor Coupling Offset 215mm to 100mm

product.name: Fernco PVC TA Saddle Branch Lateral Connection Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco PVC TA Saddle 90 Degree Branch Lateral Connection Coupling is the ideal solution for effortlessly connecting a lateral pipe to a larger smooth wall pipe of various materials, including concrete, vitrified clay and PVC. Designed to be highly adaptable, this coupling is offered for both 45° and 90° lateral connections and is available in various sizes. It guarantees resilience under internal pressure up to 0.5 bar.Highly versatile, this EPDM coupling can be utilised with pipes of any wall thickness. Its sealing mechanism involves the use of secure straps that encircle the outer surface of the main pipe, ensuring a reliable and watertight connection.Features & Benefits: Fernco PVC TA Saddle Branch Lateral Connection CouplingHighly durable coupling for connecting lateral pipes to large-diameter smooth wall pipesManufactured from EPDMSuitable for use with all pipe materials Available in multiple sizesCan withstand internal pressure of up to 0.5 bar.
product.variant_name: Fernco PVC TA Saddle 90 Degree Branch Lateral Connection Coupling 110mm to 160mm - 400mm

product.name: Fernco ICON Flexible Internal Drain Pipe Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco ICON Flexible Internal Drain Pipe Coupling is an innovative EPDM coupling designed to create a reliable and lasting seal between two pipes. Benefitting from an internal circular profile, this coupling ensures a watertight and airtight connection that remains secure and permanent, catering to pipes ranging from DN150 to DN400.To enhance its versatility and adaptability, specially designed bushes are now available to complement these couplings. This allows for seamless connections between a wide range of pipe combinations. Even when dealing with pipes of irregular or inaccessible external profiles, the endlessly versatile ICON coupling offers the same ease of use as any of our other flexible couplings, ensuring a secure bond between the pipes.Features & Benefits: Fernco ICON Flexible Internal Drain Pipe CouplingSturdy EPDM coupling for reliable and lasting pipe sealsProvides watertight and airtight connection for DN150 to DN400 pipesSecure bond even with irregular or inaccessible external profilesOptimal performance and reliability assured for pipe connectionsAvailable in multiple sizes

product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor Coupling
product.description: Designed to meet and surpass the rigorous requirements of the drainage marketplace, this adaptor coupling from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) delivers a solution for numerous adaptation situations. It can be used to connect pipelines that are different materials such as metal, cast iron and vitrified clay pipes.Including a step-moulded elastomeric sleeve with differing diameters at each end, this adaptor coupling is fitted with two stainless steel clamping bands that offer an effective method for joining pipes that have various outer diameters. This ensures it is cost-effective, eliminating potential bush requirements. It is also suitable for connecting all new and traditional pipe systems including structural walled plastic pipes.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor CouplingRange of diameters availableHigh-performance sealing qualitiesEradicates the need for grouting in most applicationsShear band ensures pipe alignment and joint flexibilityComplies with WIS 4-41-01 for all public sewers and sewers for adoptionReduces excavation workStainless steel shear band for excellent resistance to shear forces and heavy loadsDurable design with a reliable seal50-year manufacturer's guaranteeSpecial ranges of adaptor couplings integrate an extra wide clamping band at one end and are also available for ribbed pipe systems. The clamping band fastens against two or more external ribs on the plastic ribbed pipe to ensure a high-performance seal regardless of the coupling movement or position.
product.variant_name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor Coupling 136mm to 110mm

It can be used to connect pipelines that are different materials such as metal, cast iron and vitrified clay pipes.Including a step-moulded elastomeric sleeve with differing diameters at each end, this adaptor coupling is fitted with two stainless steel clamping bands that offer an effective method for joining pipes that have various outer diameters. This ensures it is cost-effective, eliminating potential bush requirements. It is also suitable for connecting all new and traditional pipe systems including structural walled plastic pipes.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor CouplingRange of diameters availableHigh-performance sealing qualitiesEradicates the need for grouting in most applicationsShear band ensures pipe alignment and joint flexibilityComplies with WIS 4-41-01 for all public sewers and sewers for adoptionReduces excavation workStainless steel shear band for excellent resistance to shear forces and heavy loadsDurable design with a reliable seal50-year manufacturer's guaranteeSpecial ranges of adaptor couplings integrate an extra wide clamping band at one end and are also available for ribbed pipe systems. The clamping band fastens against two or more external ribs on the plastic ribbed pipe to ensure a high-performance seal regardless of the coupling movement or position.

product.name: Fernco ICON 4 Inch Internal Push Fit Drain Pipe Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, these innovative Fernco ICON push-fit couplings are ideal for connecting pipes on the interior where external couplings might pose challenges. Manufactured from robust EPDM, these couplings guarantee outstanding performance, addressing various obstacles encountered in pipework. This makes them an ideal solution for connecting partially buried pipes, pipes sheared too close to a surface or those with concrete flat bottoms.Achieve a secure, watertight, and permanent connection effortlessly in just about 30 seconds, with no need for any tools. The versatility of this internal coupling is unparalleled. It passes rigorous pressure tests and seamlessly accommodates pipes made of any material. Ideal for temporary applications, the product can be conveniently removed and reused elsewhere without any complications.Features & Benefits: Fernco ICON 4 Inch Internal Push Fit Drain Pipe CouplingRobust EPDM couplings for connecting pipes with different sizesSuitable for use with partially buried pipes & pipes close to a surfaceQuick & easy to fitHighly versatile & suitable for use with any pipe materialAvailable in multiple sizes
product.variant_name: Fernco ICON 4 Inch Internal Push Fit Drain Pipe Coupling  99mm-103mm

product.name: Fernco EPDM Straight Plumbing Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco EPDM Straight Plumbing Couplings are used to connect, repair and maintain drainage systems and small-diameter non-pressure pipelines. They consist of a moulded elastomeric sleeve, which is attached using medium-duty stainless steel clamping bands at both ends. The couplings are suitable for connecting plain-ended pipes, conducting repairs on existing pipe systems by replacing short sections, and joining short and cut lengths of pipe.The drain couplings come in various sizes to accommodate any pipe material with an outside diameter of up to 275mm, and there is also an option to obtain them with nitrile sleeves. What's more, they can be utilised as adaptors between pipes made of different materials and similar sizes when used in combination with a Fernco Bush.Features & Benefits: Fernco EPDM Straight Plumbing CouplingHigh-performance EPDM drain couplingLow-cost solution to damaged drainage systemsSlides on to the damaged pipe for quick & easy installationEfficient & watertight solutionAvailable in multiple sizes
product.variant_name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Straight Plumbing Coupling 30 - 35mm

They consist of a moulded elastomeric sleeve, which is attached using medium-duty stainless steel clamping bands at both ends. The couplings are suitable for connecting plain-ended pipes, conducting repairs on existing pipe systems by replacing short sections, and joining short and cut lengths of pipe.The drain couplings come in various sizes to accommodate any pipe material with an outside diameter of up to 275mm, and there is also an option to obtain them with nitrile sleeves. What's more, they can be utilised as adaptors between pipes made of different materials and similar sizes when used in combination with a Fernco Bush.Features & Benefits: Fernco EPDM Straight Plumbing CouplingHigh-performance EPDM drain couplingLow-cost solution to damaged drainage systemsSlides on to the damaged pipe for quick & easy installationEfficient & watertight solutionAvailable in multiple sizes
product.variant_name: Fernco 67mm to 76mm Rubber Flexible Drainage Drain Pipe Coupling

product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Drain Pipe Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco flexible drain couplings serve a specific purpose in drain construction, particularly in scenarios where the resistance to earth loads, typically provided by standard couplings, is not required. These couplings play a crucial role in connecting repairing and maintaining drainage systems, as well as other small-diameter non-pressure pipelines. They feature a moulded elastomeric sleeve, securely fastened using medium-duty stainless steel clamping bands at both ends.These drain couplings are highly versatile and can accommodate various pipe materials, and they can also be supplied with nitrile sleeves for specific applications. Additionally, their design ensures ease of installation, as they simply slide onto the damaged pipe, resulting in an efficient and watertight solution. The couplings are also suitable for connecting short and cut lengths of pipe, making them an ideal choice for a wide range of applications.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Drain Pipe CouplingSturdy EPDM couplers suitable for a wide range of drainage applications Low-cost solution to damaged drainage systemsQuick & easy to install without the need for extra toolsSuitable for connecting plain-ended, short and cut pipesSuitable for use as an adaptor between pipes of different materials and similar sizes when fitted with a bushAvailable in multiple sizes

product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Underground Standard Drainage Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco Rubber Flexible Standard Drainage Couplings are designed for connecting and repairing pipelines with different diameters in sewerage, drainage and underground applications, regardless of the material or size variations. The highly versatile couplings' robust design and exceptional sealing properties ensure a reliable seal on rough pipe surfaces like concrete and deliver high-performance sealing on smoother surfaces like PVCu.In instances where excavation is necessary to fix damaged pipes, these robust EPDM couplings significantly reduce repair time and accommodate minor differences in pipe diameter. For larger diameter variations, a suitably sized bush can be used for proper installation.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Underground Standard Drainage CouplingDurable design for a high-performance & reliable sealMade from EPDM with stainless steel shear band for excellent resistance to heavy loads and shear forcesAvailable in multiple sizes for greater convenienceReduces excavation workCompliant with WIS 4-41-01 (all public sewers and sewers for adoption) High-performance sealing properties eliminate the need for grouting in most applications

product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco Rubber Flexible Standard Drainage Couplings are designed for connecting and repairing pipelines with different diameters in sewerage, drainage and underground applications, regardless of the material or size variations. The highly versatile couplings' robust design and exceptional sealing properties ensure a reliable seal on rough pipe surfaces like concrete and deliver high-performance sealing on smoother surfaces like PVCu.In instances where excavation is necessary to fix damaged pipes, these robust EPDM couplings significantly reduce repair time and accommodate minor differences in pipe diameter. For larger diameter variations, a suitably sized bush can be used for proper installation.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Underground Standard Drainage CouplingDurable design for a high-performance & reliable sealMade from EPDM with stainless steel shear band for excellent resistance to heavy loads and shear forcesAvailable in multiple sizes for greater convenienceReduces excavation workCompliant with WIS 4-41-01 (all public sewers and sewers for adoption) High-performance sealing properties eliminate the need for grouting in most applications

For larger diameter variations, a suitably sized bush can be used for proper installation.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Underground Standard Drainage CouplingDurable design for a high-performance & reliable sealMade from EPDM with stainless steel shear band for excellent resistance to heavy loads and shear forcesAvailable in multiple sizes for greater convenienceReduces excavation workCompliant with WIS 4-41-01 (all public sewers and sewers for adoption) High-performance sealing properties eliminate the need for grouting in most applications

product.name: Fernco Magnum Rubber Flexible Drainage Coupling
product.description: The Magnum Rubber Flexible Drainage Coupling from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) is designed for use in diverse sewerage and drainage as well as non- and low-pressure applications. A highly versatile solution, it can be used with any pipe material. The increased width offers enhanced tolerance when cutting the pipe ends and allows for greater freedom of movement during ground settlement. Moreover, these couplings exhibit impressive durability, withstanding pressures of up to 4 bar, depending on the diameter.Manufactured from BS EN681-1 EPDM rubber, the Magnum Couplings are designed for robustness and reliability. They are also equipped with Grade 1.4301 (304) stainless steel clamps and shear bands, ensuring secure and lasting connections even when subject to heavy loads.Features & Benefits: Fernco Magnum Rubber Flexible Drainage CouplingDurable EPDM coupling for a reliable & secure connectionCan be used with any pipe materialStainless steel shear band for improved resistance to shear forces & heavy loadsShear band ensures joint integrity & pipe alignment under heavy loadsAvailable in multiple sizes

product.name: Fernco EPDM Pipe Expansion Joint
product.description: This robust expansion joint from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) offers a one-piece design specifically tailored to handle the thermal expansion and contraction of vertical pipes in commercial and residential applications. A highly versatile and convenient solution, it can accommodate up to 1 1/2" of pipe expansion and 1/2" of contraction from their regular position.These EPDM expansion joints are an excellent alternative for DWV (Drain, Waste and Vent), with the innovative one-piece construction ensuring there are no moving parts that could potentially malfunction.Features & Benefits: Fernco EPDM Pipe Expansion JointHigh-performance EPDM expansion joint suitable for use in domestic & commercial applicationsInnovative one-piece design ensures reliability and prevents malfunctioningPositive positioning internal stopsIdeal for drain, waste and vent stacks, and interior rainwater conductor systemsQuick & easy to installAvailable in several sizes

product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Extra Wide Drainage Coupling
product.description: These extra-wide couplings from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) are designed for connecting large-diameter pipes of any material across a wide range of drainage applications. Manufactured from BS EN681-1 EPDM rubber, they feature grade 1-4301 stainless steel clamps and shear bands, which allows them to establish a high-performance seal on any pipe.What's more, these couplings allow for greater tolerance in cutting the pipe ends, facilitating an easier on-site installation. They also provide for the movement of pipes due to settlement or thermal effects, which makes them a reliable, safe and secure solution. Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Extra Wide Drainage CouplingProvides a high-performance seal on large-diameter pipelinesManufactured from EPDM rubber with grade 1-4301 stainless steel clamps and shear bands Exceptional reliability due to greater tolerance for pipe movementEasier installation due to increased tolerance on pipe ends

product.name: Fernco EPDM Moulded Drain Pipe Bush
product.description: These moulded bushes from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) consist of EPDM rubber rings that serve as supplementary components for Shear Banded Couplings or Lateral Connection Saddles. product.name: Fernco PVC Grey Plumbing Adaptor Coupling
product.description: This plumbing adaptor coupling from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) is ideal for connecting pipes with varying outside diameters, whether it's due to different pipe materials or sizes. Additionally, it is well-suited for use on smaller-diameter pipes in most low/non-pressure plumbing applications. The couplings are meticulously crafted from high-performance EPDM rubber, ensuring exceptional quality. As a standard feature, end clamps are made from grade 304 stainless steel.The installation process is quick and straightforward, providing a reliable and flexible seal that is both watertight and airtight. What's more, these couplings are designed to withstand a temperature range from -50°C to 150°C, ensuring their durability and performance even in challenging environments.Features & Benefits: Fernco PVC Grey Plumbing Adaptor CouplingProvides a reliable flexible watertight and airtight sealSuitable for use on any pipe materialIdeal for connecting incompatible pipe systems-50°C to 150°C temperature rangeManufactured from EPDM & stainless steel for high performanceQuick & easy to installAvailable in multiple sizes

product.name: Fernco PVCu Drain and Sewer Pipe Straight Connector
product.description: These drain and sewer pipe straight connector from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) offers a reliable and efficient solution for connecting pipes with similar outside diameters in various pipe materials, including plastic, cast iron, asbestos, concrete, steel, and fibreglass. product.name: Fernco EPDM Moulded Bush Drain Pipe Adaptor Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, these Fernco Moulded Bushes are durable EPDM rubber rings designed as supplementary components for Shear Banded Couplings or Lateral Connection Saddles. Their purpose is to help connect pipes with different outside diameters. These robust rubber rings serve to increase the outside diameter of a pipe, ensuring a proper fit when the pipe is too small for the coupling or saddle being used. This convenient solution facilitates a reliable and high-performance seal.Once fitted, the bush effectively fills the gap between the outside of the pipe and the inside of the coupling, creating a secure and dependable connection. The Fernco Moulded Bushes play a crucial role in ensuring efficient and effective jointing, enabling smooth connections between pipes of varying sizes for a seamless and watertight seal.Features & Benefits: Fernco EPDM Moulded Bush Drain Pipe Adaptor CouplingVersatile EPDM bush for connecting pipes with significantly different outside diametersProvides a high-performance seal on low-pressure pipesAvailable in multiple sizes for greater convenienceManufactured to meet the WIS standardCompliant with BS EN 681-1
product.variant_name: Fernco Drain Pipe Adaptor Coupling Moulded Bush - 100mm

product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drain and Sewer Pipe Adaptor
product.description: These robust rubber flexible drain and sewer pipe adaptors from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) are designed for use in emergency situations for joining pipes with similar outside diameters, regardless of the pipe size or material involved. They are made from a durable thermoplastic compound, providing them with dimensional flexibility that ensures a leak-proof seal on a wide array of pipe materials. As a standard feature, end clamps are included and made from corrosion-resistant grade 1.4301 (304) stainless steel.What's more, the adaptors are well-suited for working in confined spaces, such as under a bath or shower tray. product.name: Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve
product.description: Fernco's HDPE Penstock Valve is an effective solution for efficient water flow control in various applications, from waterways to power plants, hydropower stations, industrial effluent facilities, sewerage and wastewater treatment plants, as well as drainage and flood control projects. This permanent water gate enables you to take charge of water management, allowing you to manually adjust the flow of water to suit your specific needs.Compliant with DIN 19569-4 class 5 standards, the Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve is a reliable choice, making it an indispensable asset for civil engineering projects, channels, and wall apertures. Constructed from corrosion-resistant and UV-stable HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene), the Fernco Penstock Valve boasts enduring quality and durability, complemented by a sturdy stainless steel frame. What sets it apart is its lightweight design, significantly lighter than alternatives, ensuring hassle-free installation without the need for grout between the frame and wall. Features & Benefits: Fernco HDPE Penstock ValveOffers versatile water flow control in diverse applications, including waterways, power plants, flood control, and moreAllows manual adjustment for tailored water management solutionsComplies with DIN 19569-4 class 5 standardsManufactured from corrosion-resistant HDPE with a stainless steel frameLightweight design simplifies installationNo need for grout between wall and frameEnvironmentally friendly and fully recyclableLow-maintenanceIn addition to its operational excellence, this range of penstock valves is eco-conscious, being fully recyclable, contributing to a lower carbon footprint. Maintenance is minimal, requiring only a touch of lubrication between the frame and door, guaranteeing an extended product life. Standards & CertificationDIN Certified: DIN 19569-4 Class 5 Standards
product.variant_name: Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve - 100mm

product.name: Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve Extension Spindle Set
product.description: Effortlessly control penstock valves with Fernco's Telescopic HDPE Penstock Valve Extension Spindle Set. Ideal for below-ground or pit installations, these sets offer remote operation. Choose from a range of sizes to match your specific needs for seamless water flow management.To install your extension spindle, start by removing the BS cap. Then, place the extension spindle over the penstock spindle. Position the upper bracket 150mm below the deck or the top of the spindle extension. Divide the remaining brackets evenly over the length of the spindle extension, using one additional bracket for every 3m. Mark the mounting holes for the brackets to ensure the extension spindle is in the correct position. Remove the spindle extension and install the brackets as required. Finally, reinstall the spindle extension and adjust the bracket positions as needed to ensure proper alignment.Features & Benefits: Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve Extension Spindle SetAllows remote valve control of your penstockDesigned for below-ground or pit installationsVarious sizes available to suit specific requirementsSimplifies water flow managementQuick and easy installation
product.variant_name: Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve Extension Spindle Set - 500mm-750mm

product.name: Fernco HDPE Wall Mounted Flap Valve
product.description: Fernco's HDPE Wall Mounted Flap Valve ensures effective water flow management as part of your penstock system. These one-way valves, available in various sizes, safeguard against flooding by allowing downstream water to exit while preventing reverse flows. product.name: Fernco Puddle Flange for Drain Pipes
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, Fernco Puddle Flanges serve the purpose of sealing the area around pipes that pass through concrete structures like tanks, manhole chambers, shafts, floor slabs and basements. Manufactured from sturdy EPDM, these reliable flanges are typically installed during the construction phase.When pipes pass through concrete, they do not bond to the concrete, creating a potential route for water to flow along the external surface of the pipe. However, Fernco Puddle Flanges act as a barrier, preventing water penetration in such situations. The flange is clamped onto the pipe, obstructing this direct water route. During the pouring process, the seal body is compressed, and if the concrete shrinks during curing, the rubber in the flange relaxes and maintains a seal, preventing any water flow along this path.Features & Benefits: Fernco Puddle Flange for Drain PipesHighly versatile, cost-effective solution for sealing pipes which pass through concreteSuitable for use in walls, floors and ceilingsGood chemical resistanceQuick & easy to installAvailable in a wide range of sizes
product.variant_name: Fernco Puddle Flange for Pipes 30mm to 34mm

During the pouring process, the seal body is compressed, and if the concrete shrinks during curing, the rubber in the flange relaxes and maintains a seal, preventing any water flow along this path.Features & Benefits: Fernco Puddle Flange for Drain PipesHighly versatile, cost-effective solution for sealing pipes which pass through concreteSuitable for use in walls, floors and ceilingsGood chemical resistanceQuick & easy to installAvailable in a wide range of sizes

product.name: Fernco Single Flap Backwater Valve
product.description: Protect your property from the risks of backwater flooding with the Fernco Single Flap Backwater Valve. This valve is designed to prevent rainwater from entering the sewerage system, ensuring smooth wastewater drainage based on the slope of the rainwater drain. It comes equipped with stainless steel anti-flooding flaps and a smart body design that minimises blockages, making it an efficient rodent deterrent.Available in a broad range of sizes, it effortlessly integrates into wastewater networks with pipe diameters ranging from 110mm to 200mm. Rigorously tested for safety and compliant with BS EN 13564 standards, its robust design and maintenance-free operation guarantee peace of mind. Features & Benefits: Fernco Single Flap Backwater ValveA single-flap backwater valve designed to prevent backwater floodingSuitable for stormwater applicationsRainwater entry prevention ensures smooth wastewater drainageStainless steel anti-flooding flaps and blockage-minimising designsVersatile sizes for easy integration (110mm to 200mm pipes)Safety tested and BS EN 13564 compliantRobust, maintenance-free, and rodent-deterrent designStandards & CertificationBritish/European Standard: BS EN 13564

product.name: Graf One2Clean Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description: Graf's One2Clean Sewage Treatment Plant, which will require a power source, is designed to treat wastewater so it is clean and safe enough to discharge into a nearby watercourse. With near-silent performance, odourless operation and a discreet design that features as little technology as possible, the low-maintenance One2Clean plant will only require emptying approximately every year.With various tank sizes to choose from within the range, One2Clean will provide efficient and cost-effective sewage treatment for five to eighteen people.Features & Benefits: Graf One2Clean Sewage Treatment PlantDesigned to treat wastewater so it is clean and safe enough to discharge into a nearby watercourseAvailable in various sizesNear-silent performanceOdourless operationDiscreet design with a flat cover that sits flush with the groundFeatures as little technology as possibleLow-maintenance - will only require emptying approximately every yearFully assembled upon delivery for easy installationPerfect for all groundwater environmentsPedestrian and vehicle loading covers available25-year shell warrantyThis range features covers that are available in different weight class options to suit your project requirements. Whether you need pedestrian loading or vehicle loading covers, the Graf One2Clean Sewage Treatment Plant will provide an efficient, low-energy consuming sewage treatment solution. The flat surface allows for flush ground installation and the adjustable height allows you to make small height corrections on-site.Please note: The sludge which builds up at the bottom of the tank must also be emptied in line with the manufacturer's instructions.The water discharged from the One2Clean packaged treatment plant must meet the relevant British Standard, which is BS EN 12566 for small sewage treatment plants and BS 6297:2007 for drainage fields.Numerous companies can dispose of the waste and they must be a registered waste carrier.

With near-silent performance, odourless operation and a discreet design that features as little technology as possible, the low-maintenance One2Clean plant will only require emptying approximately every year.With various tank sizes to choose from within the range, One2Clean will provide efficient and cost-effective sewage treatment for five to eighteen people.Features & Benefits: Graf One2Clean Sewage Treatment PlantDesigned to treat wastewater so it is clean and safe enough to discharge into a nearby watercourseAvailable in various sizesNear-silent performanceOdourless operationDiscreet design with a flat cover that sits flush with the groundFeatures as little technology as possibleLow-maintenance - will only require emptying approximately every yearFully assembled upon delivery for easy installationPerfect for all groundwater environmentsPedestrian and vehicle loading covers available25-year shell warrantyThis range features covers that are available in different weight class options to suit your project requirements. Whether you need pedestrian loading or vehicle loading covers, the Graf One2Clean Sewage Treatment Plant will provide an efficient, low-energy consuming sewage treatment solution. The flat surface allows for flush ground installation and the adjustable height allows you to make small height corrections on-site.Please note: The sludge which builds up at the bottom of the tank must also be emptied in line with the manufacturer's instructions.The water discharged from the One2Clean packaged treatment plant must meet the relevant British Standard, which is BS EN 12566 for small sewage treatment plants and BS 6297:2007 for drainage fields.Numerous companies can dispose of the waste and they must be a registered waste carrier.
product.variant_name: DISCON - Graf One2Clean Sewage Treatment Plant 10 Person with Cast Iron Lid

product.name: Graf One2Clean Plus Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
The One2Clean Plus sewage treatment plant from Graf will treat the water, so that it is clean enough to be discharged into a water course (depending on how frequently it is being used and the manufacturer’s guidelines). However, One2Clean Plus sewage treatment plants do require a power source and requires emptying approximately every year.
The water discharged from the One2Clean Plus packaged treatment plant must meet the relevant British Standard which is BS EN 12566 for small sewage treatment plants and BS 6297:2007 for drainage fields.
Graf One2Clean Plus Sewage Treatment Plant Process

Untreated waste enters the One2Clean tank via the inlet on the side.
Wastewater then falls directly into the biological zone where the treatment takes place, allowing micro-organisms to start the breakdown process.
Compressed air is used initially for aeration through the diffuser, intermittent to achieve the best treatment performance.
Aeration is then stopped allowing the activated waste to sink to the bottom.
Compressed air is sent through the One2Clean tank once again, extracting the cleaned water near the surface.
This water passes through a sampling point before leaving the plant, where samples can be taken to confirm the quality of effluent.
The above process occurs twice per day, each lasting 12 hours.
The sludge which builds up at the bottom of the tank must also be emptied in line with the manufacturer’s instructions
Numerous companiescan dispose of the waste, these must be a registered waste carrier

Features & Benefits

One tank with just one chamber
Less energy consumption
No mechanical elements in the wastewater
No pumps in the wastewater
No electrical components in the wastewater
Incredibly low volume of sewage sludge
Odourless, clear treated water for extraction
State-of-the-art manufacturing for maximum stability
100% watertight and corrosion-resistant
Can be installed in groundwater
Simple maintenance via an integrated, self-cleaning sampling container
More advanced control panel than the standard One2Clean
Control panel allows additional plug in retro fitting of add on systems
product.variant_name: Graf One2Clean Xtra Sewage Treatment Plant 5 Person with Pedestrian Lid

product.name: Graf Carat Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvester Package
product.description: Designed for outdoor cleaning and irrigation purposes, the Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvesting system by Graf is ideal for collecting rainwater from the roof of your property and then feeding it into the underground tank via the downpipes. Available in various sizes, you can use the harvester for domestic or commercial use with the choice of either an A15 lid for pedestrian use or a B125 cast iron lid for light vehicular use.Before entering the underground tank, the water passes through a filter to remove debris, ensuring clear water for use. An underground pressure-sensitive pump is also installed. When a valve or tap is opened, the water is pumped under pressure until the valve is closed allowing the system to re-pressurise and turn off the power to the pump.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvester PackageLightweight for easy handling and transportationEasy and safe to assembleA15 and B125 lid options and choice of harvester sizes availableEPDM used to profile sealings and ensure minimum life of 25 yearsConstant monitoring of production ensures consistent qualitySuitable for vehicle loading when a telescopic cast iron cover is usedTwo additional hose-lock connection extraction pointsFilter prevents leaves, moss and debris from travelling with the rainwater out of the tankFilter package 2 consists of an internal Universal Filter 3, an inflow stilling system for controlling the water inflow as well as a Spannfix connection sleeve, Rodent Guard and an Overflow siphon. The Integra Inox Submersible pump features an automatic start/stop function with a floating water extraction unit and protection against dry running.Please note: If you have an above-ground tank, you can use a pump to extract the rainwater. However, if the tank is underground, you'll need a pump to extract the rainwater. It's important to consider what you'll be using the harvested rainwater for, as this will determine whether you need a backup function for periods where little rainwater is collected.
product.variant_name: Graf Carat Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvester Package 2700L with Pedestrian Lid

product.name: Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester Package
product.description: The Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester Package is available in various sizes for efficient rainwater harvesting. Whether for residential or commercial use, this system is designed to collect rainwater from building roofs, providing a cost-effective and eco-friendly water source for applications such as WCs, washing machines, irrigation, and outdoor cleaning.Choose between an A15 lid suitable for pedestrian areas or a B125 cast iron lid designed for light vehicular use, tailoring the system to your specific needs. The Graf Carat Direct system incorporates an innovative filtration process that varies based on the roof's surface area, preventing leaves, moss, and debris from entering the storage tank and ensuring the purity of the collected rainwater.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester PackageOffers efficient, cost-effective and eco-friendly rainwater harvesting in various sizesFor residential and commercial applicationsChoose between A15 or B125 lids to suit pedestrian or light vehicular areasInnovative filtration prevents debris from entering the tankProvides water for applications such as WCs, washing machines, irrigation, and outdoor cleaningReliability is enhanced with a mains water backup function, ensuring uninterrupted serviceLightweight, easy to transport and safe assemblyEPDM to profile sealings lasts more than 25 yearsOnce securely stored in the tank, rainwater is easily extracted. Above-ground tanks feature a simple tap for convenient access, like a standard water butt, while underground tanks utilise pumps tailored to different applications. To enhance reliability, the Graf Carat Direct system can be equipped with a mains water backup function, ensuring uninterrupted service during periods of limited rainwater collection. Supplied with a mains water top-up unit measure the level of water in the underground tank.

product.name: Graf Carat Septic Tank with Pedestrian Lid
product.description: Graf Carat septic tanks extract floating and removable material domestic wastewater. This is pure mechanical cleaning, for which you need 500 ltrs of capacity per inhabitant. If you assume a volume of 150 ltrs, the wastewater passes through the system in 3 days.These septic tanks must have a total volume of at least 2000 ltrs. A 2000 ltr system is sufficient for 4 inhabitants, another 500 ltrs, must be incorporated for each additional inhabitant.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Septic Tank with Pedestrian LidLow weight: can also be installed in difficult local conditions without a craneLow maintenance: maintenance or cleaning work can be performed through the shaftsTanks can be used as rainwater harvesting systems after thorough cleaningPlease note: This tank will be delivered fully assembled.

product.description: Graf Carat septic tanks extract floating and removable material domestic wastewater. This is pure mechanical cleaning, for which you need 500 ltrs of capacity per inhabitant. If you assume a volume of 150 ltrs, the wastewater passes through the system in 3 days.These septic tanks must have a total volume of at least 2000 ltrs. A 2000 ltr system is sufficient for 4 inhabitants, another 500 ltrs, must be incorporated for each additional inhabitant.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Septic Tank with Cast Iron LidLow weight: can also be installed in difficult local conditions without a craneLow maintenance: maintenance or cleaning work can be performed through the shaftsTanks can be used as rainwater harvesting systems after thorough cleaningPlease note: This tank will be delivered fully assembled.

product.name: Graf Platin Garden-Comfort Rainwater Harvesting Tank Low Profile
product.description: The Graf Platin Garden-Comfort Low Profile Rainwater Harvesting Tank is a specially developed solution designed for efficient rainwater harvesting. Available in sizes ranging from 1500 to 7500 litres, this tank offers versatility to suit various needs.Featuring an integrated filter, the tank ensures water purity, and its minimum installation depth translates to a quick and cost-effective installation process. The low weight of the tank makes it easy to transport, and its groundwater stability up to the tank shoulder adds durability.Features & Benefits: Graf Platin Garden-Comfort Rainwater Harvesting Tank Low Profile Sizes range from 1500 to 7500 litres, offering versatile options for various needsDesigned for efficient rainwater collection, with a quick and cost-effective installation process due to minimum depthIntegrated filter ensures water purityLightweight design for easy transport15-year warrantyWith the option of combining it with a cast iron telescope, the Platin tank becomes drivable by cars, enhancing its adaptability. Filter package 2 includes an internal Universal Filter 3, inflow stilling system, Spannfix connection sleeve, Rodent Guard, and Overflow siphon for comprehensive water management.Equipped with the Integra Inox Submersible pump, the tank boasts an automatic start/stop function, a floating water extraction unit, and protection against dry running. Additionally, enjoy peace of mind with a 15-year warranty, ensuring long-lasting performance and reliability. Kit Contents1 x Platin Tank1 x Telescopic Mini PE Lid, Pedestrian loading, Green1 x Overflow Siphon1 x Internal Universal Filter 3, Inflow Stilling System1 x Spannfix Connection Sleeve1 x Water Hose Connection Box1 x Intergra Submersible Pump1 x 10m Roll of pressure hose1 x Rodent Guard

product.name: Freefoam 10mm Square Edged Cappit uPVC Fascia Board 2.5m
product.description: Available in a range of fascia widths and a variety of colours and woodgrain finishes, this Square Leg Cap Over fascia has a clean, modern style and ensures a professional and neat installation. With a 10mm board thickness, this fascia board is compatible with the 10mm Square Leg Fascia/ Reveal Liner system.Ideal for improving existing wood fascia boards when original fascia boards do not need completely removing and replacing, this fascia board is suitable for protecting your existing fascia board system. Made from a strong PVC-UE foam 'core' with a protective top coating of rigid uPVC, this fascia board has a smooth, strong, hard-wearing skin that will not crack, blister or warp. Produced with extra Titanium Dioxide, this fascia board is protected from sun rays and UV damage so that it can last and look good for longer.Features & Benefits: Freefoam 10mm Square Edged Cappit uPVC Fascia Board 2.5mAir pollution resistant  Low maintenance solution for home improvement  Tested fire resistance properties  Available in a range of sizes, colours and woodgrain finishes  Environmentally friendly, lead-free installation  Protected against UV damage  Compliance with relevant BS and EU standards  Easy to handle and lightweight  Robust PVC-UE core with a durable uPVC top coating The woodgrain finish has incorporated Solar Shield Technology by innovative Renolit EXOFOL MX foil with built-in sun reflection, minimalizing profile temperature and expansion and reducing heat absorption. The coloured fascia boards are backed by advanced Colormax technology, ensuring colour matching and discolouration resistance with a 20-year guarantee for the white fascia board and a 10-year guarantee for the coloured fascia board.
product.variant_name: uPVC 400mm Fascia Board (10mm Cappit Square Edged) 2.5m - White

product.name: Freefoam 10mm Square Edged Cappit uPVC Fascia Board 5m
product.description: This Cap Over uPVC fascia board is an ideal way of improving existing wood fascia boards without a full replacement when your original fascia boards do not need to be removed completely. Ideal for protecting your existing system, this square leg fascia provides a professional, clean finish with a stylish and modern appearance.Available in a variety of colours and woodgrain finishes in a range of sizes, the coloured fascia board features Freefoam patented Colormax technology while the woodgrain finishes have been produced using market-leading Renolit Exofol with built-in Solar Shield Technology (SST) to reduce heat absorption and minimalize profile temperature and expansion. With a 10-year guarantee on coloured and woodgrain finishes and 20 years for white, this fascia board has been made with extra Titanium Dioxide, protecting against UV damage meaning it looks good and lasts for longer.Features & Benefits: Freefoam 10mm Square Edged Cappit uPVC Fascia Board 5mLeak-free, fully integrated system  Resistant to air pollution and UV damage  Available in a range of colours and sizes to fit your building needs  Home improvement solution with minimal maintenance requirements  Sustainable, environmentally friendly and lead-free  Ideal for improving your fascia boards without a full replacement installation  Made with a strong PVC-UE foam core and a rigid uPVC top coating  BBA certified to 99/3585, CSTB approved to 2/16-1766 and Quality System certified to ISO9001:2015 by SGSGuaranteed not to crack, blister or warp, this fascia board has a strong PVC-UE foam 'core' which is protected by a top coating of rigid uPVC giving a strong, hard-wearing, smooth skin. Made using an advanced environmentally friendly, lead-free formulation, this fascia board ensures maximum protection and long life with minimal maintenance requirements.

Ideal for protecting your existing system, this square leg fascia provides a professional, clean finish with a stylish and modern appearance.Available in a variety of colours and woodgrain finishes in a range of sizes, the coloured fascia board features Freefoam patented Colormax technology while the woodgrain finishes have been produced using market-leading Renolit Exofol with built-in Solar Shield Technology (SST) to reduce heat absorption and minimalize profile temperature and expansion. With a 10-year guarantee on coloured and woodgrain finishes and 20 years for white, this fascia board has been made with extra Titanium Dioxide, protecting against UV damage meaning it looks good and lasts for longer.Features & Benefits: Freefoam 10mm Square Edged Cappit uPVC Fascia Board 5mLeak-free, fully integrated system  Resistant to air pollution and UV damage  Available in a range of colours and sizes to fit your building needs  Home improvement solution with minimal maintenance requirements  Sustainable, environmentally friendly and lead-free  Ideal for improving your fascia boards without a full replacement installation  Made with a strong PVC-UE foam core and a rigid uPVC top coating  BBA certified to 99/3585, CSTB approved to 2/16-1766 and Quality System certified to ISO9001:2015 by SGSGuaranteed not to crack, blister or warp, this fascia board has a strong PVC-UE foam 'core' which is protected by a top coating of rigid uPVC giving a strong, hard-wearing, smooth skin. Made using an advanced environmentally friendly, lead-free formulation, this fascia board ensures maximum protection and long life with minimal maintenance requirements.

product.name: Freefoam Fascia Board 65mm Fixing Nails
product.description:
The plastic headed nails are produced from A4 marine grade stainless steel and are available in a wide range of colours to match all Freefoam colours and woodgrain finishes.
Plastops is a range of fixings which come in a variety of sizes and colours to match Freefoam’s fascia, soffit and cladding systems.
PVC roofline and rainwater products are fixed in place using colour matched plastic-headed pins and nails that blend into the product being installed and ensure a professional installation.
Plastops fixings are produced from A4 marine grade stainless steel to eliminate the risk of rust and discolouration, designed for high shock absorption to ensure the tops remain in place during fixing and ringshanked for increased grip when installed.

product.name: Freefoam Square Edge uPVC Fascia Board Corner
product.description: This square leg, external corner complements the Freefoam uPVC fascia range, providing a professional finish to your roofline project, seamlessly integrating with your fascia boards and the rest of your roofline system. Available in a range of sizes as standard or double with a choice of colours to match your fascia boards.Manufactured to last, this fascia corner is resistant to air pollution and will not blister, crack or warp. Made from environmentally friendly, lead-free materials, this fascia corner consists of a top coating of rigid uPVC with a strong PVC-UE foam 'core'. With a strong, smooth hard-wearing skin, this fascia corner is resistant to discolouration with a 10-year guarantee for the coloured corner and a 20-year guarantee for the white corner. The coloured fascia corners are supported by Freefoam's innovative Colormax technology to provide colourfastness, colour matching and colour variety.Features & Benefits: Freefoam Square Edge uPVC Fascia Board CornerTested fire-resistant properties  Lead-free environmentally friendly solution  Home improvement solution with low maintenance requirements  Compatible with the 10mm, 18mm and 25mm uPVC square leg fascia boards  Resistant to discolouration with a 10-year guarantee for the coloured corner and a 20-year guarantee for the white corner  UV and air pollution resistant  Made from PVC-UE foam core and uPVC solid top coating  Complies with relevant BS and European standardsThe woodgrain corners are supported by market-leading Renolit EXOFOL MX foil with incorporated Solar Shield Technology (SST). This built-in sun reflection minimalizes profile temperature and expansion by reducing heat absorption. Lightweight and easy to handle, this fascia corner requires minimal maintenance once installed.

product.name: Freefoam uPVC Fascia Board 300mm Internal Corner Joint Trim
product.description: Ideal for making lasting and unwavering connections between two fascia boards at a corner, this internal corner joint trim made by Freefoam is made of sturdy uPVC and measures at a width of 300mm.Freefoam expertly created this internal corner joint trim to hold and support two fascia boards at a corner, and at the same time leave a small gap that will give room for the fascia boards to expand and contract with thermal movement. It is made of quality uPVC that can fend against UV damage and distortion. product.description: Created to last, this 135° fascia board external corner is manufactured from robust uPVC material which is resistant to air pollution and will not blister, crack or warp. product.name: Freefoam uPVC Fascia Board 10mm Square Double Edged 2.5m
product.description: This Doubled Ended Square Leg/Plain Fascia/Reveal Liner has been manufactured to last and is available in a range of widths with a variety of colours featuring Freefoam patented Colormax technology and woodgrain finishes produced with market-leading Renolit Exofol with built-in Solar Shield Technology, reducing heat absorption and minimalizing profile temperature and expansion.Perfect for improving existing wood fascia boards without a full replacement and completely removing the original fascia boards, this fascia board is ideal for protecting your existing fascia system and providing a professional, clean finish with a stylish and modern appearance. With a smooth, hard-wearing, strong skin, this fascia board is coated with robust uPVC and has a strong PVC-UE foam 'core'. Made with extra Titanium Dioxide, this uPVC double-ended fascia board is protected from UV damage, so it looks good and lasts for longer, resisting discolouration with a 20-year guarantee for the white fascia board and a 10-year guarantee for the coloured fascia boards. Resistant to alkalis, acids, weather and other pollutants present in the atmosphere, this fascia board will not crack, blister or warp and has tested fire resistance properties. This environmentally friendly solution is 100% lead-free.

product.name: Graf Klaro E Professional Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
Klaro E Professional sewage treatment plants by Graf are always a good choice. They are flexibly adapted to meet the stricter discharge values in water protection areas. No live parts need to be installed in the Klaro E Professional. Movement processes are created by three air lift pumps that are operated using a compressor which is built into the control.
The Graf Klaro E Professional wastewater treatment system does not need consistent integration of live technology in the tank. Klaro E Professional sewage treatment plant can be flexibly adjusted to changing conditions by altering the cycle times. The air pressure holes are colour coded to avoid installation errors; the whole system just needs to be fitted to the baffle of the reservoir.
Graf Klaro E Professional Sewage Treatment Plant Features & Benefits

No live technology in the reservoir
Air compressor is very durable and whisper-quiet
Flexible, as expandable
Can be switched to holiday mode
Easy to install
Low maintenance
10-year warranty on sewage reservoirs
2-year warranty on technology
product.variant_name: Graf One Advanced Sewage Treatment Plant 10 Person with Pedestrian Lid

product.name: Freefoam 10mm uPVC Hollow Soffit Board 5m
product.description: This hollow soffit has an attractive panelled effect and ensures a professional and neat installation. Light and easy to install with a friendly tongue and groove profile, this soffit board is ideal for preserving and protecting the underside of your roof edges. Available in a range of sizes and solid colours providing a variety to match your soffit and fascia system.Made from robust uPVC with a smooth, hard-wearing and strong surface, this soffit board will not blister, crack or warp and is resistant to air pollution. With minimal maintenance requirements, this soffit board is not recommended for use on external cladding applications. Produced with extra Titanium Dioxide, this soffit board is resistant to UV damage and discolouration with a 20-year guarantee for the white soffit and a 10-year guarantee for the coloured soffit. This environmentally friendly, lead-free soffit is a cost-effective and stylish alternative to traditional timber and aluminium.Features & Benefits: Freefoam 10mm uPVC Hollow Soffit Board 5mTested fire resistance qualities  Minimal maintenance home improvement solution  Available in a range of colours and sizes  Light and easy to handle and install  Resistant to air pollution, UV damage and discolouration  Made from durable and hardwearing uPVC  Environmentally friendly, 100% lead-free material  Compliant with relevant BS and European standards
product.variant_name: uPVC 300mm Hollow Soffit Board (10mm)  5m - Anthracite

product.name: Freefoam 10mm General Purpose uPVC Soffit Board 2.5m
product.description: This solid general-purpose soffit board is available in a range of solid colours, woodgrain finishes and sizes. As an integral part of your roofline system, this soffit board preserves and protects the underside of your roof edge and provides a visually appealing and highly effective long-term solution with low maintenance requirements.Easy to fit and light to handle, this soffit board consists of a foam core made from strong PVC-UE and a top coating of rigid uPVC with a smooth, hard-wearing surface. Manufactured with extra Titanium Dioxide, this soffit board is protected against UV damage so that it will look good and last for longer with a 20-year guarantee for the white soffit board and a 10-year guarantee for the coloured soffit board. This lead-free, environmentally friendly solution is resistant to air pollution and will not blister, warp or crack with tested fire resistance qualities.Features & Benefits: Freefoam 10mm General Purpose uPVC Soffit Board 2.5mAvailable in a range of colours, woodgrain finishes and widths  Low maintenance home improvement solution  Easy and light to handle and fix  Resistant to discolouration and UV damage  Manufactured from durable uPVC top coating and solid PVC-UE core  100% lead-free, environmentally friendly solution  Complies with relevant BS and European standards  Will not warp, blister or crack

As an integral part of your roofline system, this soffit board preserves and protects the underside of your roof edge and provides a visually appealing and highly effective long-term solution with low maintenance requirements.Easy to fit and light to handle, this soffit board consists of a foam core made from strong PVC-UE and a top coating of rigid uPVC with a smooth, hard-wearing surface. Manufactured with extra Titanium Dioxide, this soffit board is protected against UV damage so that it will look good and last for longer with a 20-year guarantee for the white soffit board and a 10-year guarantee for the coloured soffit board. This lead-free, environmentally friendly solution is resistant to air pollution and will not blister, warp or crack with tested fire resistance qualities.Features & Benefits: Freefoam 10mm General Purpose uPVC Soffit Board 2.5mAvailable in a range of colours, woodgrain finishes and widths  Low maintenance home improvement solution  Easy and light to handle and fix  Resistant to discolouration and UV damage  Manufactured from durable uPVC top coating and solid PVC-UE core  100% lead-free, environmentally friendly solution  Complies with relevant BS and European standards  Will not warp, blister or crack

product.name: Freefoam 10mm General Purpose uPVC Soffit Board 5m
product.description: This Standard General Purpose Board is available in a wide range of sizes and colours, is light to handle, easy to fit and designed to work with the Freefoam fascia range. The wider soffit boards are especially useful for large box-end construction or deep soffit applications, this soffit board is a visually appealing and highly effective solution.With a 10-year guarantee of protection from discolouring for the coloured soffits and a 20-year guarantee for the white soffit, this soffit board is designed to protect and preserve the underside of any roof edge, minimizing the risk of trapped moist air, performing all year round, staying leak-free for longer, withstanding extreme temperatures from -15°C up to 30°C. As a long-term solution with minimal maintenance, this soffit board is resistant to warping, cracking and blistering. With a rigid top coating of uPVC to give a smooth, hardwearing and protective skin, this soffit board has a PVC-UE cellular foam core. Produced with extra Titanium Dioxide, this soffit board is protected from UV damage and so lasts and looks good for longer.Features & Benefits: Freefoam 10mm General Purpose uPVC Soffit Board 5mBritish Board of Agrément (BBA) certified to 99/3585, Centre Scientifique et Technique du Bâtiment (CSTB) approved to 2/16-1766 and Quality System certified to ISO9001:2015 by SGS  Resistant to air pollution and will not blister, crack or warp  Environmentally friendly, sustainable and 100% lead-free  Protected against harmful UV rays with extra Titanium Dioxide  Available in  a range of colours and sizes to fit your building needs  Performs all year round staying leak-free for longer  Home improvement solution with minimal maintenance  Compatible with the Freefoam Fascia range  Made with a rigid uPVC top coating and a strong PVC-UE foam 'core'  Light and easy to handle and install

product.description: This joint H trim from Freefoam is perfect for joining two soffit boards together. product.name: Freefoam uPVC Soffit Board Starter J Trim 5m
product.description: This soffit starter 'J' Trim has been designed to fix soffit boards, creating a long-lasting, secure and professional finish. Protecting and preserving the underside of your roof edge, this 'J' trim is fixed at each soffit bearer before the soffits are fixed to your building. This soffit trim is light to handle and easy to fit.Available in a range of solid colours and woodgrain finishes to match your soffit boards, this 'J' trim ensures a neat and professional installation. Compatible with a variety of 10mm soffits including hollow soffits, Double Vented General Purpose Board (DVGPB), Vented General Purpose Board (VGPB) and General Purpose Board (GPB), these soffits have been designed to work with the Freefoam fascia range. This robust uPVC soffit trim has a strong, smooth and hard-wearing skin protected with extra Titanium Dioxide, reducing UV damage and ensuring a long-lasting trim that looks good for longer.  Features & Benefits: Freefoam uPVC Soffit Board Starter J Trim 5mMinimal maintenance home improvement solution  Resistant to air pollution  Environmentally friendly, lead-free and recyclable  Available in a range of solid colours and woodgrain finishes  Compatible with hollow soffits, DVGPB, VGPB and GPB  Light and easy to handle and fix  Resistant to UV damage and discolouration  Compliant with BS and European standards  Made from durable uPVCResistant to discolouration, the white soffit trim has a 20-year guarantee while the coloured soffit trim has a 10-year guarantee. Guaranteed not to blister, crap or warp, this soffit trim has low maintenance requirements, has tested fire resistance properties and is resistant to normal levels of acids, alkalis, weather and other pollutants in the atmosphere. The coloured trims comprise innovative Colormax technology while the woodgrain trims incorporate Solar Shield Technology with Renolit Exofol to reflect the sun, reducing heat absorption and minimalizing profile temperature and expansion.

product.name: Freeflow Deepflow Plastic Gutter
product.description:
The Freeflow deep gutter system includes a deep round style gutter with a complete range of matching fittings to ensure a water-tight professional installation.
The deep gutter has a high flow capacity which is ideal for areas prone to high precipitation. An additional advantage of the deep gutter is less regular cleaning and maintenance due to the shape of the profile.

product.name: Freeflow Deepflow Plastic Gutter Running Outlet
product.description:
From Freefoam's innovative Freeflow rainwater systems with deep round style gutters, this running outlet is ideal for connecting your gutters to your downpipes and is made from high-quality uPVC ensuring a high flow capacity which is suitable for steep or large roofs and areas prone to high precipitation levels.Co-extruded with a white interior and a range of colours to choose from for the exterior, this running outlet decreases heat absorption and consequential thermal movement which reduces the risk of any issues such as leaks or damage through splitting or cracking. Manufactured with sophisticated compressible seals for watertight joints, this running outlet provides a long-lasting, leak-free installation with excellent reliability.  While most colours have a 10-year guarantee, the white running outlet has a 20-year guarantee.
Features & Benefits: Freeflow Deepflow Plastic Gutter Running OutletHigh waterflow capacityLightweight and easy to install with a simple clip systemVariety of colours to choose fromCo-extruded to reduce the main cause of leaksLong-life advanced compressible seals for water-tight jointsLow maintenanceEnvironmentally sustainable system20-year guarantee for white gutters with a 10-year guarantee for most other colours
Fabricated from a combination of up to 85% recycled materials and virgin materials optimises this running outlet's performance while minimalizing its environmental impact. Supplied with a protective film, this running outlet avoids the risk of scratches from transit and installation.
product.variant_name: Deepflow Style Plastic Guttering Running Outlet - Black

product.name: Freeflow Half Round Plastic Gutter
product.description:
Freeflow is a range of innovative, high quality PVC-U rainwater systems that are the result of Freefoam’s culture of continuous innovation and investment in research and development. The Freeflow range has been designed to ensure both reliable, leak-free performance and quick installation. In addition, it is compatible with other rainwater systems with a range of adaptors. Freeflow products come in a range of standard colours including white, black and brown.
Each rainwater system is co-extruded with a white interior and a range of exterior colours - Freefoam’s new innovative solution to the problems associated with rapid heat absorption and expansion of gutters. Widely published test results show that while a white surface exposed to sunshine can absorb heat and attain a surface temperature 10ºC or more over the air temperature, dark surfaces can rise a further 30-40ºC and exceed the softening point of the PVC. On large capacity gutters with a large surface area facing the sun, this can be a particular problem. While the interior will be exposed to sunlight as normal, its absorption of heat from the sun and subsequent expansion along its width and length will be significantly reduced, thus dramatically decreasing the probability of any associated problems.
product.variant_name: Freeflow 112mm Half Round Style Plastic Guttering 4m Length - White

product.name: Freefoam Square Edge uPVC Fascia Board Joiner
product.description: From Freefoam's variety of fascia accessories, this square edge joiner works by easily joining your fascia boards together while leaving an appropriate amount of space to allow for thermal expansion. Made from hardwearing and reliable uPVC, this square edge joiner is stable and defensive against UV damage that may occur due to outdoor use - such as discolouration, cracking, distorting and, like other Freefroam fascia products, it withstands air pollution excellently. This means that your joiner will efficiently hold together two fascia boards while maintaining a sleek, untarnished surface. product.name: Freeflow Half Round Plastic Gutter Running Outlet
product.description: Freefoam created this reliable half round plastic guttering outlet as a part of their innovative Freeflow range. It allows for the half round gutter to be firmly attached to the downpipeCo-extrusion technology means that this Freeflow half round running outlet can work to peak performance for as long as possible. This technology includes a white layer in order to deter heat absorption, as well as making for a sturdier lining that can withstand potential cracks and leaks. In turn, your running outlet can work better for longer and save you additional costs on repairs and replacements. Features & Benefits: Freeflow Half Round Plastic Gutter Running OutletBlack or white  112mm gutter diameter  Half round profile  Cost-effective  Up to 85% recycled material  Co-extruded to last longer  Clips create tight seals  Manufactured to European and British standards.

product.name: Freeflow Half Round Plastic Gutter Union Bracket
product.description:
Freeflow is a range of innovative, high quality PVC-U rainwater systems that are the result of Freefoam’s culture of continuous innovation and investment in research and development. The Freeflow range has been designed to ensure both reliable, leak-free performance and quick installation. In addition, it is compatible with other rainwater systems with a range of adaptors. Freeflow products come in a range of standard colours including white, black and brown.
Each rainwater system is co-extruded with a white interior and a range of exterior colours - Freefoam’s new innovative solution to the problems associated with rapid heat absorption and expansion of gutters. Widely published test results show that while a white surface exposed to sunshine can absorb heat and attain a surface temperature 10ºC or more over the air temperature, dark surfaces can rise a further 30-40ºC and exceed the softening point of the PVC. On large capacity gutters with a large surface area facing the sun, this can be a particular problem. While the interior will be exposed to sunlight as normal, its absorption of heat from the sun and subsequent expansion along its width and length will be significantly reduced, thus dramatically decreasing the probability of any associated problems.
product.variant_name: Freeflow Half Round Style Plastic Guttering Union Bracket - White

product.name: Freeflow Half Round Plastic Gutter Stopend Outlet
product.description:
These Freeflow half round stopend outlets are part of a reliable and durable PVC gutter system with excellent longevity and plenty of practical selling points. Made in a straightforward half round style, this system ensures a watertight seal throughout its life thanks to a dedicated seal built into the stopend. A combination of white interior colouring and co-extruded construction means that this range is highly resistant to heat, combating the potential softening of PVC over time, increasing the nominal service life and avoiding common issues like heat warping.The sturdy and reliable PVCu structure is both reliable and resilient, and doesn't hinder in the face of impact or weathering. With leakproof and water-tight seals, this stopend outlet is fully equipped to make for long-lasting use. The co-extruded layers involve white interiors and coloured exteriors which aim to reduce heat absorption and breakage.
Features & Benefits: Freeflow Half Round Plastic Gutter Stopend OutletHighly resistant to heat warping and damageLong-lasting watertight sealsTraditional half round profileExcellent durability thanks to co-extruded design

product.name: Freeflow Square Style Plastic Gutter Union Bracket
product.description: These Freeflow square profile union brackets are a reliable, long-lasting, and leak-free PVCu guttering system that's simple and easy to fit. Made from co-extruded PVCu, these gutter union brackets have a range of practical design features and high build quality, making them a solid building block for ogee guttering projects. Easily installed alongside Freeflow and generic square profile guttering systems, this system saves you time and money on-site, fitting snugly, securely, and with maximum water tightness, especially with downpipes fitted towards the end of the guttering line.Providing a cost-effective solution for domestic guttering projects, these easy to fit, long-lasting union brackets have a symmetrical shape that eliminates the need for left and right-handed parts. Moreover, the co-extruded layer design on these fittings minimised heat absorption, preventing cracking from thermal expansion and extending service life. These stopends have a white heat-reflective interior layer and an exterior layer from a range of popular colours.Features & Benefits: Freeflow Square Style Plastic Gutter Union Bracket114mm gutter diameterReliable and long-lasting water-tight sealsBracket's symmetrical shape eliminates the need for 'handed' partsHigh-quality co-extruded PVCu constructionSeamlessly compatible with square or round pipe systems and generic square systems Quality, leak-free performance throughout the service life

product.name: Freeflow Square Style Plastic Gutter Stopend Outlet
product.description: With a traditional square style, this uPVC square line stop end outlet is compatible with the Freeflow 65mm square pipe and 114mm square line gutter system or other square line systems with a range of adaptors. Made to ensure a leak-free and reliable installation, this stop end outlet has watertight joints with advanced compressible seals for a long-lasting installation.With a 20-year guarantee for the white stopend outlet, most other colours have a 10-year guarantee. Reducing heat absorption and expansion, this stopend outlet is coextruded with a white interior and your choice of colour for the exterior. This reduces the risk of any subsequent issues such as damage or leaking caused by thermal movement. When exposed to the sun, the white surface can absorb heat and reach a surface temperature of 10°C or more over the air temperature whereas darker surfaces can rise a further 30-40°C which exceeds the softening point of PVC.Features & Benefits: Freeflow Square Style Plastic Gutter Stopend OutletNon-corrodible, durable uPVC  Long-lasting, lightweight and simple to install  Minimal maintenance needs  Avoids leaks and noise from joint movement with advanced compressible seals  Choice of colours  Supplied with a protective film to avoid scratches during transit and installation  Compatible with the Freeflow Square Line gutter system and other square line systems with adaptors  Minimalised environmental impactThis stop end outlet is quick and easy to install, supplied with a protective film to avoid the risk of scratches during transit and installation and requires minimal maintenance. Made using a combination of up to 85% recycled materials and virgin materials, this stop end outlet has been produced to minimalize environmental impact while optimising product performance.

product.name: Freeflow Square Style Plastic Gutter Angle
product.description:
The Freeflow square line gutter system includes a traditional square style gutter with a complete range of matching fittings to ensure a water-tight professional installation. The gutter is 114mm wide, 57mm deep and is available in lengths of 4m and 5m. All square line gutter system parts are available in white, black and brown. The square line gutter is compatible with other square line rainwater systems with a range of adaptors. Square or round pipe systems may be fitted to the square line gutter system.Freeflow is a range of innovative, high quality PVC-U rainwater systems that are the result of Freefoam’s culture of continuous innovation and investment in research and development. The Freeflow range has been designed to ensure both reliable, leak-free performance and quick installation. In addition, it is compatible with other rainwater systems with a range of adaptors. Freeflow products come in a range of standard colours including white, black and brown.
Each rainwater system is co-extruded with a white interior and a range of exterior colours - Freefoam’s new innovative solution to the problems associated with rapid heat absorption and expansion of gutters. Widely published test results show that while a white surface exposed to sunshine can absorb heat and attain a surface temperature 10ºC or more over the air temperature, dark surfaces can rise a further 30-40ºC and exceed the softening point of the PVC. On large capacity gutters with a large surface area facing the sun, this can be a particular problem. While the interior will be exposed to sunlight as normal, its absorption of heat from the sun and subsequent expansion along its width and length will be significantly reduced, thus dramatically decreasing the probability of any associated problems.
product.variant_name: Freeflow 150 Degree Square Style Plastic Guttering Angle - White

product.name: Freeflow Plastic Ogee Gutter Stopend Outlet
product.description: Made from durable and long-lasting PVCu, this excellent Freeflow gutter stopend has an ogee profile and plenty of practical design features, making them an ideal all-rounder for domestic roofing projects. Easy to install alongside other ogee guttering systems, this system will save you time and money on-site, fitting snugly and securely, especially when downpipes are fitted towards the end of the guttering line.Long-lasting, cost-effective, and easy to fit, this stopend outlet's symmetrical shape eliminates the need for left and right-handed parts. product.name: Freeflow Plastic Ogee Gutter Running Outlet
product.description: This ogee profile gutter running outlet joins the rainwater system between two sections of guttering run, in turn simply and quickly connecting to the downpipe so that water can consequently reach the drain.As a cost-effective, long-lasting, and versatile product, this guttering outlet comes in a collection of colours that all incorporate co-extruded technology. The colour layer coats a white layer and reduces heat absorption, which decreases the possibility of damage during use. The sturdy uPVC structure is lightweight and easy to install with watertight, long-life seals. product.name: Freeflow Plastic Ogee Gutter Angle
product.description: These Freeflow ogee gutter angles are part of a solid and dependable traditional-style gutter system with modern materials and plenty of practical selling points. Made using a traditional 's' symmetrical style, this system ensures a water-tight seal throughout its life and doesn't need right or left-handed parts. Compatible with square and round downpipes, as well as generic ogee guttering products, these angles are available in white, black, brown and caramel.Each rainwater system is co-extruded with a white interior and a range of popular and durable exterior colour finishes. This combination of colouring and co-extruded construction means that this range is highly resistant to heat, combating the potential softening of PVC over time, increasing the nominal service life and avoiding common issues like heat warping.Features & Benefits: Freeflow Plastic Ogee Gutter AngleCompatible with generic ogee profiles, round and square downpipesHighly resistant to heat warping and damageEliminates the need for left or right-handed partsLong-lasting watertight sealsTraditional 's' ogee profile
