product.name: Freeflow Plastic Ogee Gutter Internal Stopend
product.description:
The Freeflow ogee gutter system includes a traditional ‘s’ curved style gutter with a complete range of matching fittings to ensure a water-tight professional installation. An additional benefit for customers is the symmetrical shape of the ogee gutter which eliminates the need to stock a range of left and right hand parts. The gutter is 135mm wide, 77mm deep and is 4m long. All ogee gutter system parts are available in white, black, brown and caramel. Square or round pipe systems may be fitted to the ogee gutter system.Freeflow is a range of innovative, high quality PVC-U rainwater systems that are the result of Freefoam’s culture of continuous innovation and investment in research and development. The Freeflow range has been designed to ensure both reliable, leak-free performance and quick installation. In addition, it is compatible with other rainwater systems with a range of adaptors. Freeflow products come in a range of standard colours including white, black and brown.
Each rainwater system is co-extruded with a white interior and a range of exterior colours - Freefoam’s new innovative solution to the problems associated with rapid heat absorption and expansion of gutters. Widely published test results show that while a white surface exposed to sunshine can absorb heat and attain a surface temperature 10ºC or more over the air temperature, dark surfaces can rise a further 30-40ºC and exceed the softening point of the PVC. On large capacity gutters with a large surface area facing the sun, this can be a particular problem. While the interior will be exposed to sunlight as normal, its absorption of heat from the sun and subsequent expansion along its width and length will be significantly reduced, thus dramatically decreasing the probability of any associated problems.
product.variant_name: Freeflow Ogee Style Plastic Guttering Internal Stopend - White

product.description:
This Freefoam round plastic downpipe clip from their Freeflow range is ideal for mounting pipes flush against a wall securely and reliably, time after time. These clips are easy to install thanks to a lightweight design and are made from high-quality PVCu, resisting weathering for a long service life. In addition, the white exterior is co-extruded to reduce heat absorption and thermal expansion, lessening the chance of cracks developing over the course of its service life.Made from PVCu that fends off damage from weathering, this pipe clip is high-quality and long-lasting, in turn saving you money. product.name: Freeflow Plastic Round Downpipe Flush Pipe Clip
product.description:
This Freefoam round plastic downpipe clip from their Freeflow range is ideal for mounting pipes flush against a wall securely and reliably, time after time. These clips are easy to install thanks to a lightweight design and are made from high-quality PVCu, resisting weathering for a long service life. In addition, the white exterior is co-extruded to reduce heat absorption and thermal expansion, lessening the chance of cracks developing over the course of its service life.Made from PVCu that fends off damage from weathering, this pipe clip is high-quality and long-lasting, in turn saving you money. product.name: Freeflow Plastic Round Downpipe Offset Bend
product.description:
Freeflow is a range of innovative, high quality PVC-U rainwater systems that are the result of Freefoam’s culture of continuous innovation and investment in research and development. The Freeflow range has been designed to ensure both reliable, leak-free performance and quick installation. In addition, it is compatible with other rainwater systems with a range of adaptors.
Each rainwater system is co-extruded with a white interior and a range of exterior colours - Freefoam’s new innovative solution to the problems associated with rapid heat absorption and expansion of gutters. Widely published test results show that while a white surface exposed to sunshine can absorb heat and attain a surface temperature 10ºC or more over the air temperature, dark surfaces can rise a further 30-40ºC and exceed the softening point of the PVC. On large capacity gutters with a large surface area facing the sun, this can be a particular problem. While the interior will be exposed to sunlight as normal, its absorption of heat from the sun and subsequent expansion along its width and length will be significantly reduced, thus dramatically decreasing the probability of any associated problems.

product.name: Freefoam 10mm General Purpose uPVC Vented Soffit Board
product.description:
Dimensions
Length : 5mThickness : 10mmMaterial : uPVCGuarantee : 20 years
The range of pre-vented general-purpose boards (GPBV) is a popular choice for soffit applications with a line of built-in ventilation along the length of the boards.
GPBV products are 10mm thick and are available in widths of 100mm to 600mm. The wider products are particularly useful for deep soffit applications.
GPBV products are available in white and a range of woodgrain finishes.

On large capacity gutters with a large surface area facing the sun, this can be a particular problem. While the interior will be exposed to sunlight as normal, its absorption of heat from the sun and subsequent expansion along its width and length will be significantly reduced, thus dramatically decreasing the probability of any associated problems.

product.description:
Freeflow is a range of innovative, high quality PVC-U rainwater systems that are the result of Freefoam’s culture of continuous innovation and investment in research and development. The Freeflow range has been designed to ensure both reliable, leak-free performance and quick installation. In addition, it is compatible with other rainwater systems with a range of adaptors. Freeflow products come in a range of standard colours including white, black and brown.
Each rainwater system is co-extruded with a white interior and a range of exterior colours - Freefoam’s new innovative solution to the problems associated with rapid heat absorption and expansion of gutters. Widely published test results show that while a white surface exposed to sunshine can absorb heat and attain a surface temperature 10ºC or more over the air temperature, dark surfaces can rise a further 30-40ºC and exceed the softening point of the PVC. On large capacity gutters with a large surface area facing the sun, this can be a particular problem. While the interior will be exposed to sunlight as normal, its absorption of heat from the sun and subsequent expansion along its width and length will be significantly reduced, thus dramatically decreasing the probability of any associated problems.
product.variant_name: Freeflow Square Plastic Downpipe 5.5m x 65mm - Caramel

product.name: DEKS Rapid Flash EPDM Pipe Flashing for Metal & Tiled Roofs
product.description: This DEKS Rapid Flash is a smart lead-free alternative to traditional lead-based flashings. It comes equipped with a unique stretchable base that suits all roof profiles and can be used on both metal and tile roofs. You can also trim the rubber to fit different pipe sizes.This DEKS Rapid Flash incorporates a cleverly designed mesh, free from toxic materials, and a paintable surface you can customise to suit different roof colours.Features & Benefits: DEKS Rapid Flash EPDM Pipe Flashing for Metal & Tiled RoofsRobust lead-free EPDM flashingFully adhesive baseUV-ratedPaintable surfaceSuitable for all roof profilesMarket-leading sealing systemAvailable in a range of sizes to fit your pipe diameterThis DEKS Rapid Flash is simple to install and suitable for a roof pitch between 0° and 45°. What's more, it requires minimal tools and reduces installation time by half compared to traditional lead-based solutions.

product.name: Deks Black Perform Flexible Lead Alternative Flashing - 4000mm
product.description: This Black Perform Flexible Lead Alternative Flashing by Deks is an ideal replacement for lead. It's a UV-resistant, environmentally friendly composite consisting of embedded aluminium mesh into a special type of polymer rubber. It offers the same functionality as lead and has excellent stretchability.What's more, this Perform Flashing acts as a breathable covering that prevents condensation from forming. It is also non-toxic, less heavy than lead and abides by the latest health and safety regulations. These features make the material suitable for flashing various structures, including carports, conservatories and extensions. It is available in multiple sizes for extra flexibility.Features & Benefits: Deks Black Perform Flexible Lead Alternative Flashing - 4000mmLightweight and easy to handleNon-lead flashing in BlackNo scrap value to potential thievesGreat form stability, easily cut and dressedUse full roll without need for expansion jointsStretches up to 60% in width and 20% in lengthIdeal for box or valley guttersPlease note: Items do not come supplied with fixing kits - these are to be purchased separately.
product.variant_name: Deks Perform Flexible Lead Flashing Alternative - 150mm x 4m Roll (Black)

product.name: DEKS Flat Roof Horizontal Parapet Drain Angled Pipe Connector in Brown
product.description: The DEKS Flat Roof Horizontal Parapet Drain Angled Pipe Connector is designed to efficiently divert rainwater from a horizontal square angle drain connector to a vertical downpipe. Available in cross-sections of 65mm x 100mm and 100mm x 100mm, with outlet diameters of 80mm or 100 mm, this connector ensures seamless integration with standard rainwater systems.Its sleek, linear design without grooves provides an aesthetically pleasing finish, making it suitable for high-quality buildings. Four internal wings securely attach the connector to the drain, preventing warping over time, while the dark brown colour blends neatly with commercially available rainwater pipes. Resistant to sun, ozone, atmospheric chemicals, and extreme temperatures, the connector maintains its flexibility and mechanical properties for long-term durability.Features & Benefits: DEKS Flat Roof Horizontal Parapet Drain Angled Pipe Connector in BrownDiverts rainwater efficiently from horizontal drains to vertical downpipesSleek, groove-free design with internal wings to prevent deformationResistant to sun, ozone, chemicals, and maintains flexibility in low temperatures

product.name: DEKS Flat Roof Horizontal Parapet Drain - Black EPDM
product.description: The DEKS EPDM Flat Roof Square Horizontal Parapet Drain a high-quality connector designed to link roofing membranes to rainwater drains through walls. Suitable for 90° horizontal or vertical outlet use, it is available in two cross-sections to adapt to varying water discharge requirements. The slightly angled flange simplifies installation on roofs with a fall, ensuring a secure and watertight fit.Made from flexible EPDM, the connector maintains its mechanical and physical properties even at low temperatures and resists deterioration from sun, ozone, and atmospheric chemicals. The smooth flange ensures perfect bonding with EPDM synthetic membranes, while the 425mm pipe length allows walls up to 400mm to be crossed.Features & Benefits: DEKS Flat Roof Horizontal Parapet Drain - Black EPDMWater-tight EPDM construction for long-term flexibility Smooth flange ensures perfect bonding with EPDM membranesSuitable for horizontal or vertical outlets and walls up to 400mm thick

product.name: DEKS Flat Roof Round Horizontal Parapet Drain - Black EPDM
product.description: The DEKS EPDM Flat Roof Round Horizontal Parapet Drain is a durable and flexible connector designed to link waterproof roof membranes to rainwater drains positioned near walls. Made from high-quality EPDM, it ensures long-lasting watertight performance and excellent resistance to sun and ozone. The slightly angled flange simplifies installation when fitting the connector to a roof fall, while the smooth surface guarantees a perfect bond with EPDM synthetic membranes.Its elastic material provides excellent flexibility even at low temperatures, and the 425mm long tube allows walls up to 400mm to be crossed. Compatible with prefabricated EPDM sheets and corner fittings with watertight gaskets, this connector can be positioned horizontally or vertically, making it ideal for flat roof drainage applications. Proper cleaning around the connection area ensures optimal sealing and performance.Features & Benefits: DEKS Flat Roof Round Horizontal Parapet Drain - Black EPDMEPDM construction ensures long-term watertightness and chemical resistanceSmooth flange for perfect bonding with EPDM membranesFlexible design allows installation horizontally or vertically and crossing walls up to 400mm

product.name: DEKS Flat Roof Round Horizontal Parapet Drain - Black TPE
product.description: The DEKS Flat Roof Round Horizontal Parapet Drain Black TPE is a flexible and durable connector designed to link flat roof drainage systems to rainwater downpipes. Its slightly angled flange simplifies installation on roofs with a fall, while the elastic TPE material ensures long-term watertight performance. Resistant to sun, ozone, and other atmospheric chemicals, it maintains excellent flexibility even at low temperatures.The large, perforated flange guarantees perfect adhesion with bituminous membranes, and the 425mm long tube allows walls up to 400mm to be crossed. product.description: The DEKS Flat Roof Round Horizontal Parapet Drain Black TPE is a flexible and durable connector designed to link flat roof drainage systems to rainwater downpipes. Its slightly angled flange simplifies installation on roofs with a fall, while the elastic TPE material ensures long-term watertight performance. Resistant to sun, ozone, and other atmospheric chemicals, it maintains excellent flexibility even at low temperatures.The large, perforated flange guarantees perfect adhesion with bituminous membranes, and the 425mm long tube allows walls up to 400mm to be crossed. Fully compatible with APP and SBS prefabricated bituminous membranes and coatings, the connector can be installed in a "sandwich" between membrane layers for optimal performance.Features & Benefits: DEKS Flat Roof Round Horizontal Parapet Drain - Black TPETPE construction for long-term watertightnessLarge perforated flange for secure bonding with bituminous membranesSuitable for walls up to 400mm and compatible with APP and SBS membranes

product.name: DEKS Flat Roof Square Horizontal Parapet Drain - Black TPE
product.description:
The DEKS Flat Roof Square Horizontal Parapet Drain is a high-quality connector designed to link flat roof drainage systems to rainwater downpipes through walls. Suitable for 90° horizontal or vertical outlet use, it is available in two cross-sections to adapt to varying water discharge requirements. The angled flange simplifies installation on roofs with a fall, ensuring a watertight fit.
Made from flexible TPE, the connector maintains its mechanical and physical properties even at low temperatures and resists deterioration from sun and ozone. The large, perforated flange ensures perfect adhesion with bituminous membranes, while the 425mm square tube allows walls up to 400mm to be crossed. Compatible with APP and SBS prefabricated bituminous membranes and coatings.Features & Benefits: DEKS Flat Roof Square Horizontal Parapet Drain - Black TPETPE construction for long-term flexibility, watertightness, and chemical resistanceLarge perforated flange for secure bonding with bituminous membranesSuitable for horizontal or vertical outlets and walls up to 400mm

product.name: DEKS Flat Roof Corner Joint Fitting - White TPO
product.description: The DEKS Flat Roof Corner Joint Fitting White TPO offers a practical and durable solution for sealing roof membranes at corners and edges, where detailing can often be complex. Designed to speed up installation, it provides a neat, watertight finish that reduces labour time while ensuring long-term reliability. Made from resilient TPO, this fitting withstands harsh weather, UV exposure, and ozone without losing flexibility.Even in colder conditions, it maintains its mechanical strength, preventing cracks or deformation over time. Its smooth, tapered design not only enhances waterproofing but also blends seamlessly with prefabricated TPO membranes for a clean, professional look. Perfect for challenging roof details, it combines durability, ease of use, and excellent weather resistance.Features & Benefits: DEKS Flat Roof Corner Joint Fitting - White TPOTailored for efficient membrane sealing at corners and edgesFlexible at low temperatures for consistent performanceDelivers a neat, watertight, and professional finish
